original_image_tags: Faded circular rubber stamp impression in bottom right quadrant. Text within the stamp reads "HEADQUARTERS SOUTH EASTERN AIR FORCE, AIR BASE, MO., [illegible]." Below the text, a date appears to be "18 NOV 1950." A large number "1" is stamped within the inner circle.

elements.description: A faint, circular ink stamp located at the bottom right of the page. The text within the stamp is partially illegible, but it appears to be an official seal or routing stamp.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a faint circular stamp in the bottom right quadrant, but Description A provides specific details (location text, date, large number) that Description B omits without contradicting them.
